profile.bio: Full stack developer and event enthusiast organizing tech conferences
Event enthusiast and tech professional attending conferences and workshops
Platform administrator managing events and users

events.title: AI Tech Summit 2026
events.shortDescription: India's biggest AI conference with global speakers
events.fullDescription: Join us for a 2-day immersive summit featuring AI thought leaders, hands-on workshops, networking sessions, and startup showcases. Learn about the latest advancements in machine learning, computer vision, and generative AI.

policies.refundPolicy: Full refund before 7 days of event
policies.termsAndConditions: No outside food allowed. Professional attire recommended.

events.title: Delhi Music Festival 2026
events.fullDescription: Experience the biggest music festival in North India featuring 50+ artists across multiple genres including EDM, Bollywood, Indie, and Rock. Multiple stages, food trucks, and art installations.

policies.termsAndConditions: Valid ID required. No outside food or drinks.

events.title: Startup Pitch Night - Bangalore
events.shortDescription: Early stage startups pitch to top VCs
events.fullDescription: Watch 15 early-stage startups pitch their ideas to a panel of renowned venture capitalists. Network with founders, investors, and tech enthusiasts. Cash prize for the winning startup.

events.title: Yoga & Wellness Retreat Goa
events.shortDescription: Weekend yoga retreat by the beach
events.fullDescription: Rejuvenate your mind and body with a 3-day yoga and wellness retreat in beautiful Goa. Includes daily yoga sessions, meditation workshops, healthy meals, and beach activities.

policies.termsAndConditions: No alcohol on premises. Respect quiet hours.

events.title: Hyderabad Food Festival 2026
events.fullDescription: Indulge in the rich culinary heritage of Hyderabad with 50+ food stalls, live cooking demonstrations by celebrity chefs, and cultural performances. From biryani to kebabs, experience it all!

policies.termsAndConditions: Outside food not allowed. Pets not permitted.

events.title: Python Workshop for Beginners
events.fullDescription: A hands-on 2-day workshop for absolute beginners to learn Python programming. Cover basics, data structures, functions, and build a mini-project. No prior coding experience required.

events.title: Comedy Night with Top Comics
events.shortDescription: Stand-up comedy featuring India's best comedians
events.fullDescription: An evening of laughter with a lineup of India's funniest stand-up comedians. Enjoy 2 hours of non-stop humor in an intimate club setting.

events.title: Chennai Marathon 2026
events.shortDescription: Run for a cause - Chennai Marathon
events.fullDescription: Join thousands of runners in the annual Chennai Marathon. Choose from full marathon, half marathon, 10K run, or 5K fun run. Support local charities and promote fitness.

policies.termsAndConditions: Medical certificate required for full marathon

events.title: Contemporary Art Exhibition - Jaipur
events.fullDescription: A 3-day art exhibition featuring paintings, sculptures, and digital art from 50+ emerging artists from Rajasthan. Curated by renowned art critics. Artworks available for purchase.

events.title: Blockchain & Web3 Conference
events.shortDescription: Explore the future of decentralized technology
events.fullDescription: Join leading blockchain developers, entrepreneurs, and investors for a deep dive into Web3, DeFi, NFTs, and the future of decentralized applications. Includes workshops, panels, and networking.

policies.termsAndConditions: Recordings will be shared with attendees

events.title: Wine Tasting Experience - Nashik
events.shortDescription: Explore the wine capital of India
events.fullDescription: A curated wine tasting experience at premier vineyards in Nashik. Learn about wine making, taste premium wines, and enjoy a gourmet lunch paired with selected wines.

events.title: Photography Workshop in Kerala Backwaters
events.fullDescription: A 3-day immersive photography workshop in the beautiful Kerala backwaters. Learn composition, lighting, and editing from professional photographers. Includes houseboat stay and guided photo walks.

policies.termsAndConditions: Bring your own camera or rent

events.title: Diwali Fair & Mela 2026
events.shortDescription: Celebrate Diwali with shopping, food & culture
events.fullDescription: A grand Diwali fair featuring traditional shopping, food stalls, cultural performances, fireworks, and fun activities for the whole family. Celebrate the festival of lights in style.

events.title: Leadership Summit 2026
events.fullDescription: A premier leadership conference featuring CEOs, founders, and thought leaders sharing insights on leadership, strategy, and organizational culture. Includes panel discussions and networking.

events.title: Kids Science Fair & Workshop
events.fullDescription: A hands-on science fair designed to spark curiosity in children aged 6-14. Interactive exhibits, fun experiments, robotics workshop, and science shows. Perfect for young minds.

policies.termsAndConditions: Children must be accompanied by adult

events.title: Kolkata Fashion Week 2026
events.fullDescription: A 3-day fashion extravaganza showcasing designers from Eastern India. Featuring runway shows, designer exhibitions, and styling workshops. Celebrate the rich textile heritage of Bengal.

benefits: Single day access to runway shows

events.title: Robotics Workshop for Teens
events.shortDescription: Build and program your own robot
events.fullDescription: A hands-on 2-day workshop for teenagers (13-18 years) to learn robotics. Build circuits, program microcontrollers, and create your own working robot to take home. No prior experience needed.

events.title: Chennai Classical Music Festival
events.fullDescription: A 5-day festival featuring legendary artists and rising stars of Carnatic and Hindustani classical music. Concerts, lecture-demonstrations, and artist interactions in the cultural capital of India.

events.title: Real Estate Expo 2026
events.fullDescription: India's largest real estate exhibition featuring top developers from NCR. Explore residential and commercial properties, get expert advice on home loans, and attend seminars on real estate investment.

events.title: Jaipur Literature Festival 2026
events.fullDescription: Join the celebration of literature with authors, thinkers, and readers from around the world. Book readings, panel discussions, workshops, and cultural performances in the pink city.
